summary: Maintenance-only PR updating GitHub Actions versions in .github/workflows/build.yml. The diff changes checkout, artifact upload, Docker login, GitHub Pages, and Cachix/Nix setup action versions. No decomp source files, headers, symbols, splits, or matching code were changed.

key_files.role: Only changed file; workflow action references were bumped across build, container, pages, and Nix jobs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cachix/install-nix-action v25 -> v31; cachix/cachix-action v16 -> v17

what_changed.text: Bumped GitHub checkout usage to actions/checkout@v6 in multiple workflow jobs, replacing v3 and v4 references.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Checkout steps changed from actions/checkout@v3 to @v6 and build-nix checkout from @v4 to @v6

what_changed.text: Bumped artifact upload actions for map/report artifacts from actions/upload-artifact@v4 to @v7.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Upload map and Upload report steps changed actions/upload-artifact@v4 -> @v7

what_changed.text: Bumped Docker registry login actions to docker/login-action@v4.
Bumped GitHub Pages related actions: upload-pages-artifact @v3 to @v5, configure-pages @v4 to @v6, and deploy-pages @v4 to @v5.
Bumped Nix/Cachix actions: cachix/install-nix-action @v25 to @v31 and cachix/cachix-action @v16 to @v17.

smart_moves.text: Kept the maintenance change scoped to a single workflow file with direct version replacements and no decomp source churn.

review_feedback.text: Automated decomp report for GALE01 reported 'No changes'.
